title: Microsoft Sentinel Data Lake
contentHtml:
In this episode Michael, Sarah and Mark talk with guest Mark Kendrick ( ) about a new feature Microsoft Sentinel Data Lake that is presently in public preview.
We also cover news about The Open Group - Roles and Glossary standards, Security Adoption Module 5 - Data Security, Microsoft Azure Cloud HSM, WAF and Containers, PostgreSQL and PowerBI, Azure Managed Lustre, and more. Also, Sarah mentions some Developer Security YouTube videos coming out from MS Build!
